sentences.sentence: There has always been a sense in which America and Europe owned film.
sentences.translation: 一直以来，人们都有一种感觉，认为电影属于美国和欧洲。

structure.text: There has always been a sense
in which America and Europe owned film

difficult_points: There has been 是现在完成时存在句，表示这种看法一直存在。
in which 引导定语从句，说明 sense 的具体内容。

expressions.text: There has always been a sense in which

sentences.sentence: They invented it at the end of the nineteenth century in unfashionable places like New Jersey, Leeds and the suburbs of Lyons.
sentences.translation: 他们在十九世纪末于新泽西、利兹和里昂郊区等不起眼的地方发明了电影。

structure.text: They
invented it
at the end of the nineteenth century
in unfashionable places like New Jersey, Leeds and the suburbs of Lyons

difficult_points: it 指代前句的 film。
like 后列举发明电影的具体地点。

expressions.text: at the end of the nineteenth century

sentences.sentence: At first, they saw their clumsy new camera-projectors merely as more profitable versions of Victorian lantern shows, mechanical curiosities which might have a use as a sideshow at a funfair.
sentences.translation: 起初，他们只把笨拙的新式电影放映机看作维多利亚时代幻灯秀的更赚钱版本，是可能在游乐场充当附带节目的机械奇物。

structure.text: At first
they
saw their clumsy new camera-projectors merely as more profitable versions of Victorian lantern shows
mechanical curiosities which might have a use as a sideshow at a funfair
which might have a use as a sideshow at a funfair

difficult_points: see + 宾语 + as 表示把某物看作某物。
which 引导定语从句修饰 mechanical curiosities，说明其可能用途。

sentences.sentence: Then the best of the pioneers looked beyond the fairground properties of their invention.
sentences.translation: 随后，先驱者中最优秀的人看到了这项发明超越游乐场玩意的价值。

structure.text: Then
the best of the pioneers
looked beyond the fairground properties of their invention

difficult_points: the best of the pioneers 指先驱者中最优秀的那些人。
look beyond 表示超越表面用途，看到更深层价值。

sentences.sentence: A few directors, now mostly forgotten, saw that the flickering new medium was more than just a diversion.
sentences.translation: 一些如今大多被遗忘的导演看出，这种闪烁的新媒介不只是消遣。

structure.text: A few directors
now mostly forgotten
saw
that the flickering new medium was more than just a diversion

difficult_points: now mostly forgotten 是过去分词短语，补充说明 directors 的现状。
that 从句作 saw 的宾语，more than just 表示“不仅仅是”。

sentences.sentence: This crass commercial invention gradually began to evolve as an art.
sentences.translation: 这种粗俗的商业发明逐渐开始发展成为一种艺术。

structure.text: This crass commercial invention
gradually began to evolve
as an art

difficult_points: began to evolve 表示从商业发明逐步演变。
as an art 表示演变后的身份或形式。

sentences.sentence: D W Griffith in California glimpsed its grace, German directors used it as an analogue to the human mind and the modernising city, Soviets emphasised its agitational and intellectual properties, and the Italians reconfigured it on an operatic scale.
sentences.translation: 加利福尼亚的 D·W·格里菲斯看到了电影的优雅；德国导演把它当作人类心灵和现代化城市的类比；苏联人强调它的宣传性与思想性；意大利人则以歌剧般的规模重新塑造了它。

structure.text: D W Griffith in California glimpsed its grace
German directors used it as an analogue to the human mind and the modernising city
Soviets emphasised its agitational and intellectual properties
the Italians reconfigured it on an operatic scale

difficult_points: 四个并列分句用逗号和 and 串联，分别介绍不同国家的电影观。
used it as 与 reconfigured it 中 it 都指电影这一媒介。

sentences.sentence: So heady were these first decades of cinema that America and Europe can be forgiven for assuming that they were the only game in town.
sentences.translation: 电影最初几十年的发展如此令人陶醉，以至于美国和欧洲以为自己是唯一主角，也情有可原。

structure.text: So heady were these first decades of cinema
that America and Europe can be forgiven for assuming that they were the only game in town
that they were the only game in town

difficult_points: So + 形容词置于句首引起部分倒装，正常语序是 these decades were so heady。
that 引导结果从句，for assuming 表示被原谅的原因。

sentences.sentence: In less than twenty years western cinema had grown out of all recognition; its unknowns became the most famous people in the world; it made millions.
sentences.translation: 不到二十年，西方电影已经发展得面目全非；其中原本默默无闻的人变成了世界上最著名的人；电影赚取了数百万。

structure.text: In less than twenty years
western cinema had grown out of all recognition
its unknowns became the most famous people in the world
it made millions

difficult_points: 分号连接三个并列分句，描述电影业的规模、名声和收入变化。
had grown 是过去完成时，表示在过去某时间前已发生巨大变化。

sentences.sentence: It never occurred to its financial backers that another continent might borrow their magic box and make it its own.
sentences.translation: 电影的资助者从未想到，另一个大陆可能借用他们的“魔法盒子”并把它发展成自己的东西。

structure.text: It never occurred to its financial backers
that another continent might borrow their magic box and make it its own
borrow their magic box and make it its own

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语。
make it its own 是 make + 宾语 + 补语，表示把电影变成自己的产业。

sentences.sentence: But film industries were emerging in Shanghai, Bombay and Tokyo, some of which would outgrow those in the west.
sentences.translation: 但上海、孟买和东京正在兴起电影产业，其中一些后来会超过西方的电影业。

structure.text: film industries were emerging in Shanghai, Bombay and Tokyo
some of which would outgrow those in the west

difficult_points: some of which 指代前面列出的电影产业。
those in the west 中 those 代替 film industries，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: Between 1930 and 1935, China produced more than 500 films, mostly conventionally made in studios in Shanghai, without soundtracks.
sentences.translation: 1930年至1935年间，中国制作了500多部电影，其中大多是在上海的制片厂按传统方式拍摄、没有配乐。

structure.text: Between 1930 and 1935
China produced more than 500 films
mostly conventionally made in studios in Shanghai
without soundtracks

difficult_points: mostly conventionally made 是过去分词短语，省略 which were，修饰 films。
without soundtracks 补充说明这些电影没有声音配乐。

sentences.sentence: China's best directors - Bu Wancang and Yuan Muzhi - introduced elements of realism to their stories.
sentences.translation: 中国最优秀的导演——卜万苍和袁牧之——把现实主义元素引入了他们的故事。

structure.text: China's best directors
Bu Wancang and Yuan Muzhi
introduced elements of realism to their stories

difficult_points: 破折号中的两个人名是 directors 的同位语。
introduce A to B 表示把 A 引入 B。

sentences.sentence: The Peach Girl (1931) and Street Angel(1937) are regularly voted among the best ever made in the country.
sentences.translation: 《桃花女》（1931）和《马路天使》（1937）经常被评选为该国有史以来最优秀的电影之一。

structure.text: The Peach Girl (1931) and Street Angel(1937)
are regularly voted
among the best ever made in the country

difficult_points: are voted 是被动语态，表示被评选。
ever made 是省略关系代词和 be 的分词短语，修饰 the best；片名括号格式按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: India followed a different course.
sentences.translation: 印度走上了不同的发展道路。

structure.text: India
followed
a different course

difficult_points: follow a course 是比喻表达，指采取某种发展路径。
a different course 与前文中国电影的发展方式形成对比。

sentences.sentence: In the west, the arrival of talkies gave birth to a new genre -the musical - but in India, every one of the 5000 films made between 1931 and the mid-1950s had musical interludes.
sentences.translation: 在西方，有声电影的到来催生了音乐剧这一新类型；但在印度，1931年至20世纪50年代中期制作的5000部电影每一部都有音乐插曲。

structure.text: In the west
the arrival of talkies gave birth to a new genre -the musical -
but in India, every one of the 5000 films made between 1931 and the mid-1950s had musical interludes
made between 1931 and the mid-1950s

difficult_points: give birth to 是“催生、产生”的比喻表达。
films made... 是过去分词定语，破折号两侧空格按原文保留。

expressions.text: give birth to a new genre

sentences.sentence: The films were stylistically more wide ranging than the western musical, encompassing realism and escapist dance within individual sequences, and they were often three hours long rather than Hollywood's 90 minutes.
sentences.translation: 这些电影在风格上比西方音乐剧更为多样，在单个片段中兼具现实主义和逃避现实的舞蹈，而且往往长达三小时，而好莱坞电影只有90分钟。

structure.text: The films were stylistically more wide ranging than the western musical
encompassing realism and escapist dance within individual sequences
and they were often three hours long rather than Hollywood's 90 minutes

difficult_points: encompassing 分词短语补充说明风格多样的具体内容。
rather than 引出与好莱坞片长的比较。

sentences.sentence: The cost of such productions resulted in a distinctive national style of cinema.
sentences.translation: 这类制作的成本促成了独特的民族电影风格。

structure.text: The cost of such productions
resulted in
a distinctive national style of cinema

difficult_points: result in 表示导致某种结果。
such productions 指前文长篇且包含音乐的印度电影。

sentences.sentence: They were often made in Bombay, the centre of what is now known as 'Bollywood'.
sentences.translation: 这些电影常在孟买拍摄，那里是如今所谓“宝莱坞”的中心。

structure.text: They
were often made in Bombay
the centre of what is now known as 'Bollywood'
what is now known as 'Bollywood'

difficult_points: They 指代前文印度电影，were made 是被动语态。
what is now known as 引导名词性从句，意为“如今被称为……的地方”。

sentences.sentence: Performed in Hindi (rather than any of the numerous regional languages), they addressed social and peas ant themes in an optimistic and romantic way and found markets in the Middle East, Africa and the Soviet Union.
sentences.translation: 这些电影以印地语（而不是众多地区语言）演出，以乐观浪漫的方式表现社会和农民主题，并在中东、非洲和苏联找到市场。

structure.text: Performed in Hindi (rather than any of the numerous regional languages)
they addressed social and peas ant themes in an optimistic and romantic way
and found markets in the Middle East, Africa and the Soviet Union

difficult_points: 句首过去分词短语逻辑主语是 they，说明电影使用的语言。
address 与 found 两个谓语并列；peas ant 的异常空格按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: In Japan, the film industry did not rival India's in size but was unusual in other ways.
sentences.translation: 在日本，电影产业的规模无法与印度匹敌，但在其他方面颇为独特。

structure.text: In Japan
the film industry did not rival India's in size
but was unusual in other ways

difficult_points: India's 是所有格代词，省略了 industry。
but 连接规模不大与其他方面独特的对比。

sentences.sentence: Whereas in Hollywood the producer was the central figure, in Tokyo the director chose the stories and hired the producer and actors.
sentences.translation: 好莱坞以制片人为核心，而在东京，导演选择故事并聘用制片人和演员。

structure.text: Whereas in Hollywood the producer was the central figure
in Tokyo the director chose the stories and hired the producer and actors

difficult_points: Whereas 引导对比从句，突出好莱坞和东京的权力结构差异。
chose 与 hired 并列，主语都是 the director。

sentences.sentence: The model was that of an artist and his studio of apprentices.
sentences.translation: 这种模式像是一位艺术家和他的学徒工作室。

structure.text: The model
was
that of an artist and his studio of apprentices

difficult_points: that of 代替前文 model，避免重复名词。
of apprentices 修饰 studio，说明学徒组成的工作室。

sentences.sentence: Employed by a studio as an assistant, a future director worked with senior figures, learned his craft, gained authority, until promoted to director with the power to select screenplays and performers.
sentences.translation: 未来的导演先被制片厂聘为助理，与资深人士共事、学习技艺、积累权威，直到晋升为有权选择剧本和演员的导演。

structure.text: Employed by a studio as an assistant
a future director
worked with senior figures, learned his craft, gained authority
until promoted to director with the power to select screenplays and performers

difficult_points: 句首过去分词短语逻辑主语是 a future director。
until promoted 省略了主语和 be；to select 说明导演的权力内容。

sentences.sentence: In the 1930s and 40s, this freedom of the director led to the production of some of Asia's finest films.
sentences.translation: 在20世纪30、40年代，导演的这种自由促成了亚洲一些最优秀电影的诞生。

structure.text: In the 1930s and 40s
this freedom of the director
led to the production of some of Asia's finest films

difficult_points: led to 后接名词 production，表示导致电影作品产生。
Asia's finest films 是“亚洲最优秀的电影”的最高级所有格结构。

sentences.sentence: The films of Kenji Mizoguchi were among the greatest of these.
sentences.translation: 肯吉·沟口的电影属于其中最伟大的作品之列。

structure.text: The films of Kenji Mizoguchi
were
among the greatest of these

difficult_points: among the greatest 表示“属于最伟大的一批”。
these 指代上一句提到的亚洲优秀电影。

sentences.sentence: Mizoguchi's films were usually set in the nineteenth century and analysed the way in which the lives of the female characters whom he chose as his focus were constrained by the society of the time.
sentences.translation: 沟口的电影通常以19世纪为背景，并分析他选作焦点的女性角色的生活如何受到当时社会的约束。

structure.text: Mizoguchi's films
were usually set in the nineteenth century and analysed
the way in which the lives of the female characters whom he chose as his focus were constrained by the society of the time
whom he chose as his focus
were constrained by the society of the time

difficult_points: were set 与 analysed 两个谓语并列。
the way in which 引导方式名词结构，whom 修饰 female characters。
were constrained 是被动语态，说明女性生活受到社会限制。

sentences.sentence: From Osaka Elegy(1936) to Ugetsu Monogatari (1953) and beyond, he evolved a sinuous way of moving his camera in and around a scene, advancing towards significant details but often retreating at moments of confrontation or strong feeling.
sentences.translation: 从《大阪挽歌》（1936）到《雨月物语》（1953）及之后的作品，他发展出一种蜿蜒移动摄影机的方式：镜头推进重要细节，却常在冲突或强烈情感时刻后退。

structure.text: From Osaka Elegy(1936) to Ugetsu Monogatari (1953) and beyond
he evolved a sinuous way of moving his camera in and around a scene
advancing towards significant details but often retreating at moments of confrontation or strong feeling

difficult_points: From...to... and beyond 表示作品时期范围。
of moving... 是 way 的后置修饰；advancing 与 retreating 描述镜头运动的对比。

sentences.sentence: No one had used the camera with such finesse before.
sentences.translation: 此前从没有人如此精妙地使用摄影机。

structure.text: No one
had used
the camera with such finesse
before

difficult_points: had used 是过去完成时，表示在所述时期之前无人达到这种水平。
with such finesse 表示使用方式极其精妙。

sentences.sentence: Even more important for film history, however, is the work of the great Ozu.
sentences.translation: 然而，对电影史而言更重要的是伟大导演小津的作品。

structure.text: Even more important for film history
however
is
the work of the great Ozu

difficult_points: 表语 Even more important 前置，正常语序是 the work... is even more important。
however 插入表达转折。

sentences.sentence: Where Hollywood cranked up drama, Ozu avoided it.
sentences.translation: 好莱坞把戏剧性推向高潮时，小津却避开了戏剧化。

structure.text: Where Hollywood cranked up drama
Ozu avoided it

difficult_points: Where 在这里引出对比环境，不是单纯地点。
it 指代 drama，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: His camera seldom moved.
sentences.translation: 他的摄影机很少移动。

structure.text: His camera
seldom moved

difficult_points: seldom 是频率副词，表示很少。
短句强调小津克制、静止的摄影风格。

sentences.sentence: It nestled at seated height, framing people square on, listening quietly to their words.
sentences.translation: 摄影机安置在坐姿高度，正面取景人物，静静聆听他们的话语。

structure.text: It nestled at seated height
framing people square on
listening quietly to their words

difficult_points: It 指代 His camera；framing 和 listening 是伴随动作。
square on 表示正面、平直地取景。

sentences.sentence: Ozu rejected the conventions of editing, cutting not on action, as is usually done in the west, but for visual balance.
sentences.translation: 小津拒绝剪辑惯例：不像西方通常那样按动作剪切，而是为了视觉平衡。

structure.text: Ozu rejected the conventions of editing
cutting not on action
as is usually done in the west
but for visual balance

difficult_points: cutting 分词短语说明拒绝剪辑惯例的具体方式。
not...but... 对比剪切依据，as 从句说明西方通常做法。

sentences.sentence: Even more strikingly, Ozu regularly cut away from his action to a shot of a tree or a kettle or clouds, not to establish a new location but as a moment of repose.
sentences.translation: 更引人注目的是，小津经常从动作中切出，转而拍摄树、茶壶或云朵，不是为了交代新地点，而是作为片刻的休止。

structure.text: Even more strikingly
Ozu regularly cut away from his action to a shot of a tree or a kettle or clouds
not to establish a new location but as a moment of repose

difficult_points: cut away from...to... 表示镜头从动作切换到另一个画面。
not...but... 对比切换目的，repose 指短暂的安静停顿。

sentences.sentence: Many historians now compare such 'pillow shots' to the Buddhist idea that mu - empty space or nothing - is itself an element of composition.
sentences.translation: 如今许多历史学家把这种“枕头镜头”与佛教思想相比较：无（空白或虚无）本身就是构图的要素。

structure.text: Many historians now compare such 'pillow shots' to the Buddhist idea
that mu - empty space or nothing - is itself an element of composition
empty space or nothing

difficult_points: compare A to B 表示把两者进行类比。
that 从句解释 Buddhist idea 的内容，破折号补充 mu 的含义。

sentences.sentence: As the art form most swayed by money and market, cinema would appear to be too busy to bother with questions of philosophy.
sentences.translation: 作为最受金钱和市场左右的艺术形式，电影似乎太忙于商业，顾不上哲学问题。

structure.text: As the art form most swayed by money and market
cinema would appear to be too busy
to bother with questions of philosophy

difficult_points: most swayed by money and market 是过去分词短语修饰 art form。
too...to... 表示忙于商业而无暇顾及哲学。

sentences.sentence: The Asian nations proved and are still proving that this is not the case.
sentences.translation: 亚洲国家已经并仍在证明，事实并非如此。

structure.text: The Asian nations
proved and are still proving
that this is not the case

difficult_points: proved 与 are still proving 两个时态并列，强调过去到现在的持续证明。
that 从句中的 this 指代电影不能处理哲学问题的说法。

sentences.sentence: Just as deep ideas about individual freedom have led to the aspirational cinema of Hollywood, so it is the beliefs which underlie cultures such as those of China and Japan that explain the distinctiveness of Asian cinema at its best.
sentences.translation: 正如关于个人自由的深刻理念促成了好莱坞充满抱负的电影，正是支撑中国、日本等文化的信念，解释了亚洲电影在最佳状态下的独特性。

structure.text: Just as deep ideas about individual freedom have led to the aspirational cinema of Hollywood
so it is the beliefs which underlie cultures such as those of China and Japan that explain the distinctiveness of Asian cinema at its best
which underlie cultures such as those of China and Japan

difficult_points: Just as...so... 构成“正如……所以……”的对应结构。
it is...that... 是强调句，强调真正解释亚洲电影独特性的 beliefs。
which 修饰 beliefs，those of China and Japan 代替 cultures。

sentences.sentence: Yes, these films are visually striking, but it is their different sense of what a person is, and what space and action are, which makes them new to western eye.
sentences.translation: 没错，这些电影在视觉上引人注目；但正是它们对“人是什么”以及“空间和行动是什么”的不同理解，使它们在西方眼中显得新颖。

structure.text: Yes
these films are visually striking
but it is their different sense of what a person is, and what space and action are, which makes them new to western eye
what a person is
what space and action are

difficult_points: it is...which... 是强调结构，强调 films 的不同理解。
两个 what 从句作 sense 的内容，分别讨论人、空间和行动的本质；原文 western eye 为单数表达，按原文保留。
